arguments.argument:
if global.location=15 sprite_index=sMarbleSpike else if global.location=40 or global.location=105 sprite_index=sVaultSpike else if global.location=59 sprite_index=sFacSpike else if global.location=103 { sprite_index=sMarbleSpike var myShadow; myShadow=instance_create(0,0,oObjectShadow) myShadow.ownerID=id; myShadow.type=2; myShadow.maxShadowDist=192 }
if variable_local_exists("idFollow") bFollow=true
